calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Distribution Of Surplus Funds To Jp Morgan Chase Bank, N.A.
Off Calendar Feb-11-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Jason Savloy, Esq. of RCO Legal, P.S. (714-277-4899) for Claimant/moving pary JP Morgan Chase Bank though Court Call.
No other appearances.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

CLAIMANT JPMORGAN CHASE BANK'S MOTION For Distribution Of Surplus Funds To Jp Morgan Chase Bank, N.A. is GRANTED. No opposition filed. Prevailing party to submit order approved as to form. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Distribution Of Surplus Funds To Jp Morgan Chase Bank, N.A.
Off Calendar Jan-12-2015 Continued To Feb-11-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES:
No Appearances: The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows

CLAIMANT JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A.'s Motion For Distribution Of Surplus Funds To Jp Morgan Chase Bank, N.A. is continued to February 11, 2015.
Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B and provide courtesy copy of the moving papers to department 501 no later than January 16, 2015 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. The Court is in receipt of 2 copies of the proposed order.
Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: R. Goulding; Dept.501; Not Reported

MINI MINUTES: Appearance on Friday, March 14, 2014:
Seth M. Harris, Esq. McCarthy & Holthus, LLP [619.685.4815] appears by telephone for Petitioner / Moving Party RECONTRUST COMPANY

The Court, having reviewed briefs submitted, adopts the tentative ruling as follows: PETITIONER RECONTRUST COMPANY'S Motion To Deposit Surplus Funds is GRANTED, no opposition filed. Judge: Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk L. Fong; matter not reported. (D501)
